name: skill-frontmatter
assertion: SKILL.md exists with name: generator and distinguishes the core pipeline from the one-off gen-*.mjs legacy scripts

name: env-checker-runs
assertion: node .agent/skills/generator/scripts/check-generator-env.mjs runs and never prints GOOGLE_API_KEY's value

name: list-designs-runs
assertion: node .agent/skills/generator/scripts/list-designs.mjs runs and reports all three design-shaped locations without crashing when any of them don't exist locally

name: three-locations-not-conflated
assertion: The skill clearly separates vault/pages/designs/ (real), vault/pages/skins/ (generated docs), and designs/<slug>/ (generated build output)

name: legacy-improver-warned
assertion: The skill explicitly warns against resurrecting improve-theme.mjs's text-only repair pattern, citing the documented screenshot-vs-text failure

name: scopecss-dead-code-noted
assertion: The skill flags that scopeCss() is dead code despite the architecture doc describing it as the isolation mechanism
